title: [Bug]: `truncate`返回了预期之外的类型，导致`select distinct`出现预期之外的结果
description: master分支版本，`truncate`返回了预期之外的类型，导致`select distinct`出现预期之外的结果。
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t_test (id, value) VALUES (1, 123.45), (2, NULL), (3, 678.90);
SELECT DISTINCT ROUND(value) AS rounded_value FROM t_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t_subquery (ref_id INT, ref_value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO t_subquery (ref_id, ref_value) SELECT id, value FROM t_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: truncate returns unexpected type affecting select distinct results
